visual_description: Several men in business attire and jackets are moving through an office or workspace filled with computers and bulletin boards displaying images. One man carries an orange briefcase while walking past others, some of whom are seated or standing near monitors, and another man in a dark jacket with “OCTB” on the back is visible. Most individuals are in motion or engaged with their surroundings, with some looking toward screens or conversing with colleagues.
